laws.title: Public Law 9-53 | Save Our Businesses Act of 2022
laws.chronology_conclusion: Section 5 remains the live executable amendment to 3 U.S.C. 301, but later law PL 12-84 partially strikes sections 5-7, so the act is only partially current.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_amendment_command: Preserve the section 5 amendment to 3 U.S.C. 301 and account for the later partial strike of sections 5-7 by PL 12-84.

provisions.conclusion: This is the operative amendment to 3 U.S.C. 301 and remains live in substance.

usc/usc03.xml contains the branch implementation at Title 3.
origin/main does not show the same note implementation.
provisions.notes: This provision should remain in the positive-law chain.

provisions.conclusion: Short title, severability, later repeal language, and purpose/implementation material are not separate executable Code text.
evidence: The primary report flags later-law displacement of part of the act.
Only section 5 is the durable amendment target.

laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch has the Title 3 note; origin/main does not. The branch still needs later-law awareness for the partial strike of sections 5-7.
laws.final_recommended_action: Keep the section 5 amendment, trim the note, and carry the later-law partial-strike limitation forward.
